skills.name: Ansible Setup
skills.desc: Understanding Ansible setup is crucial, including installing Ansible, configuring inventory files, and setting up SSH connectivity to target hosts.

skills.name: Delegate Action Locally
skills.desc: This skill involves delegating actions to the control machine, allowing certain tasks to be executed on the control machine rather than remote hosts.

skills.name: Package Manager
skills.desc: This skill involves using Ansible modules to manage packages on remote hosts, including installation, removal, and updating of software packages.

skills.name: Execute Commands
skills.desc: In this skill, Ansible modules are used to execute commands on remote hosts, enabling automation of command-line operations and system management.

skills.name: Transfer Files
skills.desc: Transferring files between the control machine and remote hosts is a key task, and this skill involves using Ansible modules to securely copy files.

skills.name: Schedule Tasks
skills.desc: Ansible modules allow scheduling tasks on remote hosts, automating repetitive actions and ensuring tasks are executed at specified intervals.

skills.name: Test Output
skills.desc: This skill involves using Ansible modules to test and verify the output of commands and scripts executed on remote hosts, ensuring desired results.

skills.name: Retrieve Files
skills.desc: Using Ansible modules, you can retrieve files from remote hosts, enabling efficient file backup and transfer operations.

skills.name: Manage Files/Directories
skills.desc: Ansible modules provide the ability to manage files and directories on remote hosts, including creating, deleting, and modifying them.

skills.name: Download URL
skills.desc: This skill involves using Ansible modules to download files from URLs, which can be useful for fetching resources from the internet.

skills.name: Network Test
skills.desc: This skill involves using Ansible modules to perform network tests on remote hosts, ensuring network connectivity and diagnosing issues.

skills.name: Run Scripts
skills.desc: Ansible modules enable the execution of custom scripts on remote hosts, automating complex tasks and configurations.

skills.name: Execute Shell Commands
skills.desc: This skill focuses on executing shell commands on remote hosts using Ansible modules, facilitating system management.

skills.name: File Statistics
skills.desc: Ansible modules provide the capability to gather file statistics on remote hosts, helping in monitoring and auditing file attributes.

skills.name: Generate Files from Templates
skills.desc: Ansible modules can generate files from templates, allowing for the dynamic creation of configuration files based on variables and templates.

skills.name: Set Group Variables
skills.desc: This skill involves setting variables for specific host groups in Ansible inventory, allowing for group-specific configurations.

skills.name: Define Inventory Groups
skills.desc: In Ansible, defining inventory groups is essential for grouping hosts with similar characteristics or roles for targeted automation tasks.

skills.name: Set Host Variables
skills.desc: This skill focuses on setting variables for individual hosts in the Ansible inventory, enabling host-specific configuration.

skills.name: Multiple Inventory Sources
skills.desc: Ansible supports multiple inventory sources, allowing you to gather host information from various external sources and merge them for automation tasks.

skills.name: Iteration
skills.desc: In Ansible playbooks, iteration is essential for performing actions repeatedly, such as iterating over a list of items to execute tasks.

skills.name: Execute Playbook
skills.desc: Executing Ansible playbooks is a fundamental skill, as it allows you to automate complex workflows and configurations.

skills.name: Assign Roles
skills.desc: Assigning roles in Ansible playbooks helps in organizing and modularizing automation tasks, making playbooks more manageable.

skills.name: Iterate Items
skills.desc: This skill involves iterating over items in lists and dictionaries in Ansible playbooks, enabling dynamic and data-driven automation.
